en-US.summary: Voice interface for the Connected Care clinical intelligence platform
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask Connected Care what's the fall risk for Room 412
Alexa, ask Connected Care any alerts right now
Alexa, ask Connected Care when was Room 308 last repositioned
en-US.name: Connected Care
en-US.description: Clinical intelligence at your voice. Query patient vitals, fall risk, pressure injury status, device health, and proactive alerts hands-free.
